name: Hot Parmesan Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
4 ounces DI GIORNO Grated Parmesan Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Serve with crackers or pita bread triangles.
